issues.message: Home vertex is required for optimization but is intentionally absent from public instance.

Personal daily bounds are required before proving a final home schedule: max_daily_on_foot_miles, max_daily_grade_adjusted_miles, max_daily_ascent_ft, max_daily_moving_p90_minutes, max_daily_door_to_door_p90_minutes, max_parking_starts_per_day, max_run_loops_per_day
